# Primus Digital

> Premium digital marketing agency in Zagazig, Sharqia, Egypt. Social media
> management, media buying, coverage, and business solutions for brands across
> Egypt. Packages from 3,499 EGP/month; every engagement starts with a free
> page audit.

Key facts for agents:

- Agency name: Primus Digital (بريموس ديجيتال)
- Location: Zagazig, Sharqia, Egypt — serving Zagazig, 10th of Ramadan, Belbeis, and all of Egypt
- Services: social media management, media buying (Meta ads), event/brand coverage, business solutions (funnels, automation, analytics), elite videography, website design & development, mobile app development
- Pricing: Signature Starter 3,499 EGP/mo · Pro Growth 4,999 EGP/mo (most popular) · Elite Prestige 7,999 EGP/mo · Custom by request
- Contact: WhatsApp +20 106 807 2135 (https://wa.me/201068072135?text=FIRST), email primusdigitalcorpration@gmail.com
- Offer: complimentary page audit for new inquiries — no pitch, no obligation

- [Full site as markdown](https://primusdigitalagency.vercel.app/index.md): complete services, method, packages, FAQ, and contact details
- [Homepage](https://primusdigitalagency.vercel.app/): the canonical site (request with `Accept: text/markdown` for the markdown version)
- [Agent skills index](https://primusdigitalagency.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): skills for interacting with the agency
